relations.npc43_jiang_haotian: 同为吃苦型学生·互相鼓励
relations.npc57_yue_pengcheng: 实验室邻居·工科苦逼联盟

profile.innate_zh: 毅力强、不服输、动手能力好
profile.learned_zh: 从文科跨考到材料的经历让他比谁都珍惜这个机会
profile.learned_en: Liberal-arts to materials switch taught him to cherish the chance
profile.belief_zh: 既然选了就要做到最好
profile.belief_en: If I chose it, I'll do it right
profile.goal_zh: 弥补本科知识短板·尽快进入科研状态
profile.goal_en: Fill the undergrad gap and enter research mode
profile.contradiction_zh: 别人的基础比自己好 vs 不能让跨考背景成为借口
profile.contradiction_en: Others' foundations are stronger vs. can't use that as excuse
profile.deep_zh: 内心承受着巨大的追赶压力
profile.desire_zh: 用实力证明跨考生也可以
profile.rhythm_zh: 全天学习，几乎没有娱乐
profile.spaces_zh: 材料实验室、图书馆、宿舍
profile.long_desire_zh: 这学期把三门补修课全部通过
profile.long_desire_en: Pass all three make-up courses this term
profile.short_goal_zh: 今晚看完固体物理第三章
profile.constraint_zh: 基础知识缺口大；实验操作需要从零学起
profile.constraint_en: Large knowledge gap; needs lab basics from scratch
profile.bias_zh: 倾向低估自己文科背景带来的独特视角
profile.bias_en: Underestimates the unique angle his LA background gives
profile.narrative_zh: 笨鸟先飞，我多花两倍时间就好了
profile.narrative_en: Dumb birds fly first; I just put in twice the time
